raw_input:
[5.0/5] Great Serum!! I am a serum junky so I feel like I have a pretty good idea on what to look for in serums! Hollyberry Cosmetics, Clinical Strength Hyaluronic + Vitamin C Serum For Dry and Problem Skin - Premium Skin Moisturizer Anti Wrinkle and fine lines. Brighten + Even Blemishes Quick drying, is AWESOME! I truly love most any serums that have Vitamin C in them. I have only been using this serum for about four days and I can already see a difference! My face has cleared up almost completely. It is a clear serum that is not too runny, which I love because there is not such a rush to just "throw' it on your face before it runs down your fingers. This serum soaks in rather quickly, so if you are like me, and have a whole regimen of serums, toners, moisturizers, ect, to put on your face, neck, and chest, following with make up, this is quite important to me. I can also see the brightening part of this serum working for my complexion, evening it out. I am only twenty seven years old, but I did a lot of tanning in high school, so I am trying to make up for the damage I caused to my skin, and its never too early to prepare your skin for aging that will come in the future. I have two children ages four and five, so I am tired quite often, which causes dark circles under my eyes, and this Clinical Strength Hyaluronic + Vitamin C Serum For Dry and Problem Skin - Premium Skin Moisturizer Anti Wrinkle and fine lines. Brighten + Even Blemishes Quick drying works for this as well! The ingredients are perfect in covering quite a few different problems, so its kind of an all in one, type serum, which i love! I am a very impatient person, so I like serums that I can either see or feel a difference rather immediately, than a serum that you have to use for a long time before seeing results, so if you are like me, I definitely recommend this serum!! I have spent all kinds of money on super expensive serums thinking that the more money you spend, the more results you will see, and that is just not the case.

Also, when I try a new serum, I do not use any other serums that are similar to this one, so I can get a good idea of what results this serum will really show. I like to add that in because even though I have many serums, if I were to use a similar serum to this one, I like to give it a fair chance! This one definitely passed!!
I did receive this product for free or a discounted price, but I was in no way compensated or told to leave a good review. I take my reviews VERY seriously, as I am an avid amazon shopper and rely solely on others HONEST reviews when making my purchases. I know there are some bad eggs out there that will leave a 5 star review for any product they receive for free or a discounted price, but I am not one of them. I am asked to leave an **honest** review, and that is what I do. Feel free to look through my profile and see this for yourself. Also, if my review has helped you in any way, please do not hesitate to hit the helpful button! If you feel I could have written a better review or have any tips on how I could improve my reviews please let me know, and I will try my best to improve! I truly hope this helped! [5.0/5] It's great! This is a thick vitamin C serum and I am extremely pleased with the results I am getting while using this. There is no added fragrance and it does not sting or burn at all while using this product. (well...at least I haven't experienced it so far.) It comes with a glass dropper to make using more convenient and to use as little or as much as you like. It is clear in color. I only use a little of this serum on my face and neck, as it takes very little to see improvements. If I use too much, it becomes sticky and less likely to dry as fast as I like it to. My skin is brighter and healthier and has a subtle glow that everyone had commented on lately. I am no longer dealing with an oily t-zone because this has definitely had a drying effect on the oiliness of my skin, thankfully! My only issue is, that I can't get much out of the dropper because of the thickness of this serum. Overall, I am very pleased with this vitamin C serum and the effects are wonderful!

*Disclaimer*
I was fortunate enough to have received this product at a discounted price in exchange for my honest and unbiased review [2.0/5] No lo recomiendo Este producto no sirve!! [5.0/5] I have tried MANY different types of moisturizers but haven't found too many that I just love. The Hyaluronic Acid plus Vitamin Having combination skin, I have tried MANY different types of moisturizers but haven't found too many that I just love. The Hyaluronic Acid plus Vitamin C Serum from HollyBerry Cosmetics blew me away! Some serums leave an oily residue on the skin, but this one left my skin so moisturized without the slick/oily look! My skin feels so much better than it did just a few months ago. I saw results so quickly with this product! [5.0/5] Hyaluronic and vitamin c .... Wonderful product ...ordered 3 by mistake ...gave one to my granddaughter 24 yrs old....she loves it ! She was fighting adult breakout ....after using face clear..I'm 62 and no more dry skin... product has improved face and neck greatly ..... [5.0/5] So far i really like it So far I am loving this product. It doesn't cause excessive dryness (mind you I have eczema), and it doesn't cause any irritation to my skin even when it is close to my eyes. I have been using vitamin C and Hyaluronic serums for awhile and have tried different products. I like this one bc it is an all in one and cuts a little time out of my daily routine. [5.0/5] leaves my skin looking and feeling hydrated, toned, and glowing This hyaluronic acid vitamin c serum came in a 1 fluid ounce brown glass bottle with a dropper. This vitamin c serum is organic and natural. Not tested on animals, no parabens, no sulfates, no alcohol. The serum states it helps with premature ageing, and help with giving your skin a fresh look as well as hydrating, firming, and plumping our skin. I am getting older so I am always looking for a natural product that will help with premature ageing. This serum feels very nice on my skin. I have been using it twice a day since I have received it and I have notice a change in my skin already. I have noticed that my skin is more even and my skin also has a nice glow to it. The serum does have my skin looking very refreshed and hydrated. My best friend just recently asked me what was on my face and neck because I was glowing. I told her what I was using and she plans on getting a bottle her self. Even though I have not started to get any wrinkles I still want to be able to get a jump start on things. I really like this serum, the serum is not that thick and a little goes along way. I also like how the serum dries really fast on my face. I will have to add this to my facial regimen.

Disclaimer: I have received this item at a discount for my hones unbiased review. My opinions are of my own into what I experienced with this item. [5.0/5] leaves my skin looking and feeling hydrated, toned, and glowing This hyaluronic acid vitamin c serum came in a 1 fluid ounce brown glass bottle with a dropper. This vitamin c serum is organic and natural. Not tested on animals, no parabens, no sulfates, no alcohol. The serum states it helps with premature ageing, and help with giving your skin a fresh look as well as hydrating, firming, and plumping our skin. I am getting older so I am always looking for a natural product that will help with premature ageing. This serum feels very nice on my skin. I have been using it twice a day since I have received it and I have notice a change in my skin already. I have noticed that my skin is more even and my skin also has a nice glow to it. The serum does have my skin looking very refreshed and hydrated. My best friend just recently asked me what was on my face and neck because I was glowing. I told her what I was using and she plans on getting a bottle her self. Even though I have not started to get any wrinkles I still want to be able to get a jump start on things. I really like this serum, the serum is not that thick and a little goes along way. I also like how the serum dries really fast on my face. I will have to add this to my facial regimen.

Disclaimer: I have received this item at a discount for my hones unbiased review. My opinions are of my own into what I experienced with this item. [5.0/5] Five Stars Great product! A+++++ [5.0/5] my face feels so soft and looks much better. i just use it a little bit cause ... i've tried other products but this one is one of my favorites. my face feels so soft and looks much better.
i just use it a little bit cause if you use it a lot it gets sticky but little bit is all you need to see the difference.

Disclaimer: I received this product at a discount in exchange for an honest review. [5.0/5] Love this product so far Love this product so far! This is the second time I have purchased it. I use it in the morning and at night. I see a difference in the brightness and a glow in my skin. It appears to be firmer around the sides of my mouth and eye area. Skin undergoes constant wear and tear and with any product you have be consistent and give it time to work. In my opinion about two months before you start realistically seeing a difference.

response:
Here is a summary of the product reviews for the Hollyberry Cosmetics Hyaluronic Acid and Vitamin C Serum:

The vast majority of reviewers gave this product 5 out of 5 stars and were very happy with their results. Common positive points included noticeable skin brightening and a healthy glow, improved hydration without an oily or greasy feeling, fast drying time, and visible results appearing relatively quickly. Several reviewers noted it helped with specific concerns like dark circles, adult acne, dry skin, oily skin, and uneven skin tone. Many appreciated that it works as an all-in-one serum, simplifying their skincare routine. The product comes in a glass bottle with a dropper, is clear in color, and contains no parabens, sulfates, or alcohol. A couple of reviewers noted that using too much can make it sticky, so a small amount is recommended. The serum was well received by a wide range of ages, from young adults to those in their 60s.

The only negative review was a brief two-star comment in Spanish stating the reviewer did not recommend the product, with no further details provided.

Overall, the product received overwhelmingly positive feedback, with most users planning to continue using it and some even repurchasing it.
